problem_solved: School health services and vaccination planning need better digital tools for tracking student health records, vaccinations, and health interventions across Swedish schools.
who_buys_it: Schools, school nurses, municipalities, school health services
key_features: Digital journal system for school health (elevhälsa)
Vaccination planning and tracking
Health intervention documentation and follow-up
business_model: SaaS subscription to schools and municipalities
why_varden_should_care: Proven model for digitizing school health services in a universal healthcare system - highly replicable to other regions with school-based health services and vaccination programs.

problem_solved: Healthcare providers need secure digital platforms for triaging patients, conducting video consultations, and managing digital care workflows efficiently.
who_buys_it: Healthcare providers, clinics, hospitals, primary care centers
key_features: AI-powered triage and decision support (Visiba Triage)
Secure video consultations and messaging (Visiba Care)
Integrated appointment booking and care navigation
business_model: SaaS platform subscription to healthcare providers
why_varden_should_care: Strong B2B platform model for digital care that can support pediatric telemedicine - well-positioned to scale to other markets with similar healthcare structures.

problem_solved: Healthcare organizations need integrated IT systems to manage patient data, clinical workflows, and documentation efficiently while ensuring compliance.
who_buys_it: Hospitals, healthcare regions, public health authorities, municipalities
key_features: Electronic health record (EHR) systems for healthcare
AI-based speech recognition for documentation in elderly care
Municipal EHR systems and healthcare IT integration
why_varden_should_care: Large-scale healthcare IT infrastructure player with proven ability to deploy across regions - demonstrates replicability of enterprise healthcare IT solutions in public systems.

problem_solved: Healthcare providers across primary care, child health centers, school health services, and laboratories need integrated electronic health record systems for seamless documentation.
who_buys_it: Primary care clinics, child health centers (barnhälsovård), school health services (elevhälsa), occupational health, laboratories, specialist clinics
key_features: Digital journal system (CGM J4) for primary and specialist care
Specialized modules for child healthcare (barnhälsovård) and school health (elevhälsa)
Integrated telehealth through CGM Video
business_model: SaaS subscription for EHR and e-health systems
why_varden_should_care: Directly serves child health centers and school health - clear template for pediatric-focused EHR solutions in public health systems with strong replicability potential.

problem_solved: Healthcare organizations across the Nordics need modern digital platforms and IT services to transform care delivery and integrate patient data across systems.
who_buys_it: Hospitals, healthcare regions, public health authorities, clinics
key_features: Healthcare digital transformation and consulting services
Integrated healthcare IT platforms and data solutions
Regional healthcare information systems
business_model: IT services and enterprise software licensing
why_varden_should_care: Major IT infrastructure provider across Nordic healthcare - demonstrates the enterprise model for healthcare digitization that can be replicated in other public health systems.

problem_solved: Healthcare providers across the Nordics need comprehensive e-health solutions including electronic health records, patient management, and clinical documentation tools.
who_buys_it: Regions, municipalities, hospitals, primary care centers, private healthcare providers
key_features: Cambio COSMIC - leading electronic health record (EHR) system in the Nordics
Cambio VIVA for healthcare documentation and workflow management
Cambio Ambient Scribe - AI-powered clinical documentation
why_varden_should_care: Leading Nordic EHR provider with proven model for scaling across public healthcare systems - strong template for replicating comprehensive pediatric EHR solutions.

problem_solved: Patients need convenient access to healthcare services including doctor consultations, vaccinations, and ongoing care management through digital channels.
who_buys_it: Patients (B2C), regions (B2B for digital care services), employers (occupational health)
key_features: 24/7 digital doctor consultations via app
Physical vaccination clinics at pharmacy locations
Integrated digital and physical care services
business_model: B2C telemedicine + B2B contracts with regions and employers
why_varden_should_care: Pioneering digital-first care model with integrated vaccination services - demonstrates hybrid telemedicine-physical care model relevant for pediatric care delivery.
